mnemonics.title: Canny Steps
mnemonics.content: Noisy Gradients Never Help: Noise Reduction → Gradient → Non-max Suppression → Hysteresis

acronyms.usage: Combined smoothing and edge detection operator

visualTips.visualization: Imagine sliding a 3x3 stencil over the image, multiplying and summing values at each position

analogies.analogy: Like tracing coastlines on a map - finding where land (bright) meets sea (dark)
